verdicts.name: scout_warm_night_soft
verdicts.reason: Too warm, neon-like glow contradicts muted cinematic direction

verdicts.name: scout_warm_night_muted
verdicts.reason: Cohesive warmth with cinematic restraint, matches downtempo mood

verdicts.reason: Clean cool tones, professional feel, good depth

verdicts.name: scout_warm_night_muted_2
verdicts.reason: Refined warmth, expensive grade quality, great cohesion

verdicts.name: scout_green_night_soft
verdicts.reason: Subtle green cast adds cinematic depth, mood-appropriate

verdicts.name: scout_neutral_night_soft
